classifieds_104.POSSIBLE REASONS FOR FAILURE:
1.  The agent did not utilize the "Rvs + campers" category filter to narrow down the listings, instead relying only on the "Latest Listings" section and general scrolling. This significantly limited the scope of RVs inspected.
2.  The agent prematurely declared the task infeasible after only checking one RV and scrolling the main page, without thoroughly exploring all available RV listings or search options.
3.  The agent did not systematically check all available listings for an "iPhone screenshot" image, which is a specific visual cue required by the objective.
classifieds_104.REFLECTION: In future attempts, first, use the "Rvs + campers" category filter to view all relevant listings. Then, systematically examine the images of each RV, starting from the most recently listed (if sorting options are available, otherwise assume top results are most recent), to identify one that is an "iPhone screenshot." Only after thoroughly checking all relevant listings should the task be deemed infeasible. Once the correct RV is found, proceed to add the specified 3-star rating, title, and comment.
